### validate_tutorial_structure

>  validate_tutorial_structure (nb_path:pathlib.Path, project:pathlib.Path,
>                                   lib_name:str)

*Validate a tutorial notebook’s structure.*

Checks: - Has title markdown cell - Imports the library correctly - No
export directives (tutorials shouldn’t export) - Has runnable examples

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>nb_path</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td>Tutorial notebook path.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td>Project root.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>lib_name</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Library name.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>List</strong></td>
<td><strong>Issues found.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### validate_all_tutorials

>  validate_all_tutorials (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                              check_errors:bool=True)

*Validate all tutorial notebooks.*

Looks for tutorials in {project}/tutorials/ directory (NOT
nbs/tutorials).

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>check_errors</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Whether to scan for error outputs.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Validation results.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### suggest_extractions

>  suggest_extractions (project:Optional[str]=None, min_occurrences:int=3,
>                           min_lines:int=3)

*Suggest code blocks that could be extracted as utilities.*

Looks for repeated code patterns that appear multiple times.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>min_occurrences</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>3</td>
<td>Minimum number of occurrences.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>min_lines</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>3</td>
<td>Minimum lines of code.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Extraction suggestions.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
